coordinate_evidence_note: National Trust page names Altona Homestead and describes a long reputation for hauntings; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Altona Homestead point.
evidence_summary: National Trust Australian Heritage Festival page lists Altona Homestead Ghost Tour and says this particular homestead has had a long reputation for hauntings and has been the centre of paranormal investigations. The Langhorne family are long deceased but, given their colourful history and the births, deaths and heartaches linked with the building, the page says it is no surprise that the Homestead is alive with activity.

evidence_summary: ABC Hobart Drive's Tasmanian urban myths transcript includes a listener reference to the Ghost of Kelly Steps. Lyndon Riggall responded that he had heard the story, had lived in the Battery Point area, and had been told to be very careful on Kelly Steps at night, with a murder and possible haunting forming part of the local legend.
